## ✅ Update: Platform Scaffolding & Documentation Enhancements

This issue covers the initial setup and standardization of the KingKen Global platform structure, along with key documentation and workflow improvements.

---

## 📁 Platform Scaffolding

Core directories have been structured to support scalability and modular development:

* `03-crm/` → CRM system (structure, schemas, workflows)
* `04-ai-system/` → AI automation and intelligence layer
* `05-saas-platform/` → SaaS architecture and platform model
* `06-design/` → UI/UX and design system documentation

This establishes a clear separation of concerns across core systems.

---

## 📚 Documentation Expansion

* Expanded and refined core project documentation
* Standardized documentation format for consistency
* Improved clarity on system roles, workflows, and architecture

---

## 🧩 Issue Templates

* Introduced structured templates for:

  * 🐛 Bug reports
  * ✨ Feature requests

These improve issue tracking, clarity, and team collaboration.

---

## 🏗️ ARCHITECTURE.md Completion

* Defined overall system architecture
* Documented platform layers (Frontend, Backend, Database, AI, SaaS)
* Clarified system interactions and data flow
* Positioned the project for scalable, multi-region deployment

---

## 🚀 Impact

* Establishes a production-ready repository structure
* Improves developer onboarding and collaboration
* Aligns project with scalable SaaS architecture standards
* Prepares platform for active development and deployment

---

## 📌 Status

✔ Platform structure initialized
✔ Documentation expanded
✔ Issue templates added
✔ Architecture defined

This issue can now be considered **complete and ready for the next development phase**.
